title: Trump Threatens Iran Bridges Amid Ongoing Peace Talks
meta_description: US President Donald Trump has issued a dire warning to Iran, threatening to destroy every bridge and power plant in the country if Tehran does not accept a proposed peace settlement. Negotiations are set to resume in Pakistan soon.
excerpt: US President Donald Trump has issued a dire warning to Iran, threatening to destroy every bridge and power plant in the country if Tehran does not accept a proposed peace settlement. Negotiations are set to resume in Pakistan soon.

title: Trump's Iran Threats Escalate Tensions Amid Cargo Ship Crisis

title: Euphoria Episode 2 Recap: Existential Crises and Aperol Spritzes
meta_description: Euphoria Episode 2 brings unexpected reunions and philosophical musings. Read our full recap of the season's most pivotal moments and character developments.
excerpt: Euphoria's second episode brings several fan-favorite character pairs back together in emotionally complex reunion scenes. As characters grapple with existential questions and unresolved trauma, the episode uses visual metaphors and philosophical discussions to explore themes of identity, connection, and redemption.

title: Tariff Refund Portal Launches Monday: What You Need
meta_description: New tariff refund portal goes live Monday as first phase of court-ordered compliance. Billions in potential refunds explained.
excerpt: A new federal tariff refund portal launches Monday, April 21st, 2026, to process billions of dollars in reimbursements. The initiative follows court orders finding certain tariff collections violated legal requirements, marking the first phase of potentially one of the largest government refund programs in recent history.

title: Trump's Disapproval Surges as Iran War Drags On
meta_description: NBC News poll shows Trump's approval at 37% as Iran conflict remains unpopular. Disapproval ratings climb amid ongoing peace negotiations.
excerpt: A new NBC News poll reveals President Trump's job approval has fallen to just 37% amid the ongoing Iran conflict. The survey shows 61% of Americans disapprove of the administration's military strategy in Iran, with economic concerns and lengthy peace negotiations driving public dissatisfaction. Trump's disapproval rating has reached historic highs during his tenure as the unpopular war continues to dominate public opinion.

title: China Holds Lending Rates as Growth Accelerates Amid Mideast Tensions
meta_description: China maintains benchmark lending rates unchanged as economic growth strengthens. Economists push back interest rate cut forecasts amid Middle East geopolitical risks.
excerpt: China's central bank held benchmark lending rates steady as robust economic growth reduces near-term stimulus needs. Economists have pushed back forecasts for interest rate cuts, citing both strong domestic fundamentals and emerging Middle East geopolitical risks.
